news.title: Oil Prices Rise As Iran Vows Escalation For Next U.S. Strike, But S&P 500 Futures Gain
news.summary: U.S. oil prices bounced back above $90 a barrel early Monday after Tehran issued a stark warning after retaliating for U.S. strikes over the weekend.  The U.S. attacks targeted Iranian radar and other command-and-control infrastructure.  Iran's threat didn't flummox stock market bulls, as S&P 500 futures pointed higher, aiming for an eighth straight gain.
